summary: Tested /founder page and homepage CredibilityStrip link. All 14 test criteria passed. The /founder page renders with dark dossier aesthetic, no founder portrait, all required data-testids, content blocks, and classification band.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iterations 94-96 all pass at 100%. /founder page is fully functional. Homepage CredibilityStrip has credibility-founder-link pointing to /founder. No images on founder page except 2 logo imgs in navbar/footer. All data-testids present: founder-identity-block, founder-origin, founder-pattern, founder-system, founder-signature, founder-cta, founder-reach-cta.

test_results.signature_gold_quote: PASS - I don't do your compliance
test_results.no_founder_portrait_img: PASS - only 2 logo imgs in navbar/footer
